storyAcceptanceCriteria: The system should respond as expected when the test action is performed

testCases.title: Verify basic system response to test action
preconditions: User has access to the system
System is in a stable and operational state
User is logged in or on the relevant page
steps: 1. Open the application or navigate to the relevant section of the system
2. Identify the element or feature associated with the test action
3. Perform the test action (e.g., click a button, submit a form, or trigger an event)
5. Compare the actual response to the expected result
testCases.expectedResult: The system responds as expected without errors, displaying the correct output or state change corresponding to the performed test action
acceptanceCriteria: The system should respond as expected when the test action is performed
testCases.automationReason: A stable and deterministic UI interaction with a verifiable outcome is suitable for Playwright automation once the actual feature is defined
